character.definition: broken; to break, ruined, reason; cause; right, principle; theory, to arrange; to repair, to regulate; to operate; to govern
to plant; to sow; to cultivate
(same as 鷊) a kind of bird, a kind of grass, (same as 鶃) a fabulous sea bird

readings.reading: とばりのひるがへるこえ

character.definition: the felloe or rim of a wheel
reed screen; frame for growing silkworms
thin and flat slips of bamboo used for weaving purpose
